title.title: Learning Objectives
title.subtitle: What you will learn in this course

heading: By the End of This Course
intro: You will be able to understand, explain, and critically analyze blockchain technology — its mechanics, its promise, and its limits.

core.title: Core Blockchain Concepts
core.description: Understand the fundamentals: DLT, hashing, cryptography, transactions, wallets, digital signatures, and consensus mechanisms.

evolution.title: Evolution & Applications
evolution.description: Trace the history from cypherpunks to Bitcoin, and understand how blockchain evolved into the industry it is today.

benefits.title: Benefits & Advantages
benefits.description: Identify blockchain's key strengths: transparency, immutability, decentralization, censorship resistance, and trustless operation.

impact.title: Real-World Impact
impact.description: Analyze which industries are being transformed by blockchain — from finance and supply chain to healthcare and digital identity.

challenges.title: Challenges & Limitations
challenges.description: Evaluate the key obstacles blockchain still faces: scalability, energy consumption, regulation, usability, and ethical concerns.
